HERMIT-STRIKE_HERMIT.title: Strike
HERMIT-DEFEND_HERMIT.title: Defend
HERMIT-SNAPSHOT.title: Snapshot
HERMIT-SNAPSHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]:
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt first.
HERMIT-ONE_FLASH.title: One Flash
HERMIT-ONE_FLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt first.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
HERMIT-DESPERADO.title: Desperado
HERMIT-DESPERADO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Double this card's damage this combat.
It costs an extra {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
HERMIT-HEADSHOT.title: Headshot
HERMIT-HEADSHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]:
Deal double damage.
HERMIT-QUICKDRAW.title: Quickdraw
HERMIT-QUICKDRAW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Next turn, draw {DrawFewerCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} less {DrawFewerCardsNextTurnPower:plural:card|cards}.
HERMIT-WIDE_OPEN.title: Wide Open
HERMIT-COVET.title: Covet
HERMIT-HIGH_CALIBER.title: High-Caliber
HERMIT-HIGH_CALIBER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Strike{UpgradeAmount}[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HERMIT-BODY_ARMOR.title: Body Armor
HERMIT-BODY_ARMOR.description:
Discard a card.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If it was a non-Attack, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] again.
HERMIT-SNIPE.title: Snipe
HERMIT-SNIPE.description: Your next [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect this turn triggers twice.
HERMIT-CALLED_SHOT.title: Called Shot
HERMIT-CALLED_SHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card played this turn triggered [gold]Dead On[/gold], draw a card.
HERMIT-DISSOLVE.title: Dissolve
HERMIT-DISSOLVE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your next {BlurPower:diff()} turns.
HERMIT-BLACK_WIND.title: Black Wind
HERMIT-BLACK_WIND.description:
Deal damage equal to your missing HP.{InCombat:cond:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
HERMIT-PURGATORY.title: Purgatory
HERMIT-SHADOW_CLOAK.title: Shadow Cloak
HERMIT-SHADOW_CLOAK.description: Whenever you draw or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a Curse card, gain {ShadowCloakPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
HERMIT-DEBTS_OF_SIN.title: Debts of Sin
HERMIT-DEBTS_OF_SIN.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] ALL [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards from other players.
Add ALL exhausted curse cards to your Hand.
HERMIT-FATAL_DESIRE.title: Fatal Desire
HERMIT-FATAL_DESIRE.description: At the start of your turn, draw {MachineLearningPower:diff()} cards and add an [gold]Injury[/gold] to your Hand.
HERMIT-GAMBIT.title: Gambit
HERMIT-GAMBIT.description:
Put {Cards:diff()} random Attacks from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
They cost 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
HERMIT-ROUGHHOUSE.title: Roughhouse
HERMIT-MALICE.title: Malice
HERMIT-MALICE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a Curse, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies instead.
HERMIT-DEADEYE.title: Deadeye
HERMIT-GHOSTLY_PRESENCE.title: Ghostly Presence
HERMIT-GHOSTLY_PRESENCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Dead On[/gold]:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
HERMIT-ADAPT.title: Adapt
HERMIT-ADAPT.description: At the start of your turn, you can [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card to gain 8 [gold]Block[/gold].
HERMIT-DIVE.title: Dive
HERMIT-FLASH_POWDER.title: Flash Powder
HERMIT-ROULETTE.title: Roulette
HERMIT-ROULETTE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Discard your Hand.
Draw that many cards.
HERMIT-MIDNIGHT.title: Midnight
HERMIT-MIDNIGHT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add an [gold]Impending Doom[/gold] to your Hand.
HERMIT-GLARE.title: Glare
HERMIT-TAKE_COVER.title: Take Cover
HERMIT-TAKE_COVER.description:
Add a [gold]Defend{IfUpgraded:plus()}[/gold] to your Hand.
Upgrade it X times.
It free to play this turn.
HERMIT-MISFIRE.title: Misfire
HERMIT-MISFIRE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Shuffle a [gold]Clumsy[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
HERMIT-SPRAY_PRAY.title: Spray n' Pray
HERMIT-SPRAY_PRAY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
Shuffle a [gold]Doubt[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
HERMIT-SCAVENGE.title: Scavenge
HERMIT-IMPENDING_DOOM.title: Impending Doom
HERMIT-IMPENDING_DOOM.description: If this is [gold]Dead On[/gold] at the end of your turn, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to EVERYONE.
HERMIT-MEMENTO_CARD.title: Memento
HERMIT-SHORT_FUSE.title: Short Fuse
HERMIT-SHORT_FUSE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} per [gold]Strike[/gold] or [gold]Defend[/gold] played this turn.
HERMIT-GRUDGE.title: Grudge
HERMIT-SPITE.title: Spite
HERMIT-SPITE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards in your Hand.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
HERMIT-MANIFEST.title: Manifest
HERMIT-MANIFEST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Decay[/gold] to your Hand.
HERMIT-FEINT.title: Feint
HERMIT-LOW_PROFILE.title: Low Profile
HERMIT-HORROR.title: Horror
HERMIT-HORROR.description:
Apply {BruisePower:diff()} [gold]Bruise[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Bruise[/gold] does not wear off this turn.
HERMIT-NO_HOLDS_BARRED.title: No Holds Barred
HERMIT-NO_HOLDS_BARRED.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {BruisePower:diff()} [gold]Bruise[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Next turn, lose {Energy:energyIcons()}.
HERMIT-CHEAT.title: Cheat
HERMIT-CHEAT.description:
Play one of the top {Cards:diff()} cards in your draw pile.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]:
Also trigger its [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect.
HERMIT-VANTAGE.title: Vantage
HERMIT-VANTAGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Dead On[/gold]:
Draw and Upgrade {Cards:plural:a card|{Cards:diff()} cards}.
HERMIT-BRAWL.title: Brawl
HERMIT-BRAWL.description: At the start of your turn, apply {BruisePower:diff()} [gold]Bruise[/gold] to ALL enemies.
HERMIT-COMBO.title: Combo
HERMIT-COMBO.description: Put the first {IfUpgraded:show:ComboPower:diff() |}[gold]Dead On[/gold] card triggered each turn back into your Hand.
HERMIT-OVERWHELMING_POWER.title: Overwhelming Power
HERMIT-OVERWHELMING_POWER.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Whenever you end your turn with {energyPrefix:energyIcons(0)}, lose {OverwhelmingPowerPower:diff()} HP.
HERMIT-MAINTENANCE.title: Maintenance
HERMIT-MAINTENANCE.description:
Strikes deal {MaintenanceStrikePower:diff()} more damage this combat.
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
This costs 1{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} more each time you play it.
HERMIT-ETERNAL_FORM.title: Eternal Form
HERMIT-ETERNAL_FORM.description: The first 4 playable cards drawn at the start of each turn cost 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} that turn.
HERMIT-ETERNAL_SENTENCE.title: Eternal Sentence
HERMIT-ETERNAL_SENTENCE.description:
All cards cost 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
You can no longer gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
At the start of your turn, add a random [gold]Curse[/gold] to your Hand.
HERMIT-FULLY_LOADED.title: Fully Loaded
HERMIT-FULLY_LOADED.description: Add ALL [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [gold]Defends[/gold] from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to your Hand.
HERMIT-GESTALT.title: Gestalt
HERMIT-ROUNDHOUSE_KICK.title: Roundhouse Kick
HERMIT-ROUNDHOUSE_KICK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Stun[/gold] any that don't intend to attack.
HERMIT-CURSED_WEAPON.title: Cursed Weapon
HERMIT-CURSED_WEAPON.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Permanently increase the damage of ALL [gold]Cursed Weapons[/gold] by {Increase:diff()}.
HERMIT-ENERVATE.title: Enervate
HERMIT-ENERVATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:plural:a card|{Cards:diff()} cards}.
HERMIT-RICOCHET.title: Ricochet
HERMIT-TRACKING_SHOT.title: Tracking Shots
HERMIT-LONE_WOLF.title: Lone Wolf
HERMIT-LONE_WOLF.description:
Choose a card.
It's free to play this turn.
Discard the rest of your Hand.
HERMIT-HIGH_NOON.title: High Noon
HERMIT-HIGH_NOON.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Strike[/gold] or [gold]Defend[/gold], draw a card.
HERMIT-REPRIEVE.title: Reprieve
HERMIT-TAKE_AIM.title: Take Aim
HERMIT-TAKE_AIM.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Concentrate[/gold].
HERMIT-MAGNUM.title: Magnum
HERMIT-MAGNUM.description:
Discard {Cards:diff()} cards.
For each card, deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
HERMIT-DETERMINATION.title: Determination
HERMIT-DETERMINATION.description: Whenever a debuff is applied to you, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
HERMIT-SHOWDOWN.title: Showdown
HERMIT-SHOWDOWN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play all [gold]Strikes[/gold] in your Hand.
HERMIT-LUCK_OF_THE_DRAW.title: Luck of the Draw
HERMIT-LUCK_OF_THE_DRAW.description: Draw cards until their total cost is {Threshold:diff()} or more.
HERMIT-COALESCENCE.title: Coalescence
HERMIT-COALESCENCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Retain[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} cards this turn.
HERMIT-COALESCENCE.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards to Retain.
HERMIT-PISTOL_WHIP.title: Pistol Whip
HERMIT-DEAD_MANS_HAND.title: Dead Man's Hand
HERMIT-DEAD_MANS_HAND.description:
Discard your Hand.
Add the {Cards:diff()} rarest cards from your Draw Pile to your Hand.
HERMIT-DEAD_OR_ALIVE.title: Dead Or Alive
HERMIT-DEAD_OR_ALIVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], get a [gold]Bounty[/gold].
HERMIT-GOLDEN_BULLET.title: Golden Bullet
HERMIT-GOLDEN_BULLET.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], permanently reduce this card's cost by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
HERMIT-HOLE_UP.title: Hole Up
HERMIT-ITCHY_TRIGGER.title: Itchy Trigger
HERMIT-ITCHY_TRIGGER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Reduce the cost of a random card in your Hand by {CostReduction:diff()} this turn.
HERMIT-EYE_OF_THE_STORM.title: Eye Of The Storm
HERMIT-FINAL_CANTER.title: Final Canter
HERMIT-FINAL_CANTER.description:
For each [gold]Curse[/gold] in your Hand, deal {Damage:diff()} damage.{InCombat:cond:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
HERMIT-HEROIC_BRAVADO.title: Heroic Bravado
HERMIT-HEROIC_BRAVADO.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Rugged[/gold].
Increase the cost of this card by {CostIncrease:diff()} this combat.
HERMIT-FROM_BEYOND.title: From Beyond
HERMIT-FROM_BEYOND.description:
For each card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], a random enemy loses {HpLoss:diff()} HP.{InCombat:cond:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} times)|}
HERMIT-VIRTUE.title: Virtue
HERMIT-VIRTUE.description: Reduce each of your stackable debuffs by {Reduce:diff()}.
HERMIT-SMOKING_BARREL.title: Smoking Barrel
HERMIT-SMOKING_BARREL.description: Whenever you trigger a [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect, gain {SmokingBarrelPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
